session.name: MPI-127 LTX-2.3 app integration — Batch 1 + WAN tier-2 + Phase 3 complete; Phase 4 next

goal.original: Continue MPI-127: stand up the LTX-2.3 video model family in Cubric Vision (workflow-gen + deps + ops + audio-mode UI + tier-2 capture fix).
goal.summary: Foundations done: workflow-gen handler, 9 deps + pinned LTXVideo node, capture fix, WAN bumped to tier-2, tier-2 param feed (dual-emit alias) — all verified. LTX ships SINGLE-STAGE this release (dual-latent stage-2 carded to MPI-128). Remaining: Phase 4 (LTX model entry + ops), Phase 5 (audio-mode UI), Phase 6 (docs/rules + release:check), plus run mpic-compute-dep-hashes.

next_action.description: Start Phase 4: add the ltx-23 model entry to js/data/modelConstants/models.js (type:'ltx', tier-2, mediaType:'video', SINGLE-STAGE ops this release — no previewStage/_ms, capabilities:{audio:true}, loraStrengths:['model'], no loraStages, 9 commonDeps including ComfyUI-LTXVideo), and register the LTX i2v/t2v operations in js/data/commandRegistry.js with audio + 2-image (i2v) / 1-audio (t2v) mediaInputs slots. The audio-slot gating mechanism is ALREADY DECIDED (see key_decisions 'LOCKED — audio-slot gating'): capability-gate at read points, NOT the big Phase-2 refactor — do NOT re-ask the user this. ALSO NOTE the plan-drift fix this phase must make: the shared i2v/t2v mediaInputs still carry bare 'Start_Frame'/'End_Frame' titles, but the re-authored WAN + LTX workflows both use 'Input_Start_Frame'/'Input_End_Frame' — retitle the shared slots to Input_* (fixes WAN too, since WAN is now tier-2). Read the plan + dependencies.js LTX block + the generated comfy_workflows/LTX_i2v.json (verify titles, never guess) first.

key_decisions: LTX ships SINGLE-STAGE this release; dual-latent stage-2 staging + preview→Continue carded to MPI-128 (user decision). LTX ops must register WITHOUT previewStage/_ms.
Op-key approach: shared i2v/t2v ops (NOT ltx_* keys). User re-authored WAN to tier-2 so the whole video fleet is uniform — no tier flag.

Tier-2 param feed = dual-emit ALIAS in _buildParams (every bare key also emitted as Input_<key>), NOT a tier flag or control migration. Safe because comfyController silently skips params with no matching node title. Image workflows stay tier-1.

Audio is first-class media (like image/video): big audio icon in gallery + prompt box; audio-only cards NOT clickable into history workspace (like a preview). i2v = up to 2 images (start+end) + 1 audio; t2v = 1 audio. 5+-image multimodal UI deferred (max is a data seam).

LOCKED — audio-slot gating mechanism (do NOT re-ask): the shared i2v/t2v ops DECLARE an audio mediaInputs slot (title 'Input_Audio_File', required:false); WAN must never show/accept it, so FILTER the slot out when model.capabilities?.audio !== true at the slot-resolution read points (MpiPromptBox _mediaSlotsForOperation + commandExecutor getCommandMediaInputs call site). This is the 'capability-gate at read points' option, NOT the full baseComponents/multiStageComponents refactor (that bigger Phase-2 generalization is explicitly deferred — not needed to ship single-stage LTX). The audioMode Reference|Original radio is Phase 5, separate from this slot gating.

Deps: 4 of 9 on MPI HF (gemma/soft-enhance/transition/talkvid); 5 upstream (Kijai transformer+2VAE+text-projection, Lightricks spatial-upscaler) — self-host deferred to MPI-128 (39GB upload tax). Re-host rule carve-out: mirror community files, trust stable first-party.
generate_ltx.py is NO-SPLICE (unlike WAN): LTX bakes the stage-2 switch (Input_Is_Continue drives MpiIfElse) so derive = flip one boolean. Temporal upscaler NOT used (only spatial).
constraints: RunPod is a SHARED branch — commit by explicit pathspec, never git add -A. User decided NOT to branch/bump tonight; push through on RunPod.
scalable-foundation mode: resolve decisions up-front, no mid-implementation forks.
sha256 for all 9 LTX deps is still null — MUST run mpic-compute-dep-hashes before any ship/build.
Pre-existing uncommitted cosmetic edit in dependencies.js (comment banners) is NOT ours — leave it / do not sweep into commits.
LTX is the FIRST model with non-merged baked LoRAs (transition/soft/talkvid in commonDeps, baked strengths in the workflow, NOT user slots). LoRA filenames carry LTX2.3/ subfolder nesting.
Workflow node titles are the contract — verify against the generated LTX_*.json, never guess titles (has bitten twice this session).
files_modified: js/services/commandExecutor.js (capture fix line ~906 + tier-2 dual-emit alias + Input_Video_Latent)

resume_prompt: Read .agents/mpi-kanban/state/handoffs/04a6836a-da30-455d-b7c8-a8edaf882955.json and use mpi-continue to resume MPI-127 (LTX-2.3 app integration, branch RunPod). Batch 1 + WAN tier-2 bump + Phase 3 (tier-2 param feed) are DONE and verified; LTX ships SINGLE-STAGE this release (dual-latent stage-2 is carded to MPI-128). Your next action is Phase 4: add the ltx-23 model entry to js/data/modelConstants/models.js (type:'ltx', mediaType:'video', SINGLE-STAGE ops — no previewStage/_ms, audio capability, loraStrengths:['model'], no loraStages, commonDeps = the 9 LTX deps incl ComfyUI-LTXVideo) and register the LTX i2v/t2v ops in js/data/commandRegistry.js (i2v: up to 2 image slots + 1 audio slot; t2v: 1 audio slot; audio = first-class media). Verify node titles against the generated comfy_workflows/LTX_i2v.json — never guess titles. Then Phase 5 (audio-mode Reference|Original radio in MpiPromptBox) and Phase 6 (rules + release:check). Before any build, run mpic-compute-dep-hashes to fill the 9 null sha256 in dependencies.js. Commit by explicit pathspec only (shared RunPod branch); do not push.
